error.signature: Datadog custom metric bill spike — tag cardinality explosion

verdict.summary: High-cardinality tags (user_id) on custom metrics create millions of unique time series.

dead_ends.action: Just remove all tags from metrics
dead_ends.why_fails: Removing all tags makes metrics ungroupable and useless for debugging

dead_ends.action: Switch to logs for everything instead of metrics
dead_ends.why_fails: Log ingestion at high volume is often more expensive than metrics

workarounds.action: Audit tags for cardinality: remove unbounded tags like user_id
workarounds.how: Replace user_id with user_tier in Metrics Summary

workarounds.action: Use Metrics without Limits to control indexing
workarounds.how: Configure tag allowlist: only index low-cardinality tags
